scripts.build:agent: npm run build:agent:win && npm run build:agent:linux && npm run build:agent:mac
scripts.build:agent:win: npm run bundle:agent && pkg build/local-agent.cjs --targets node20-win-x64 --output dist/slack-activity-agent-win-x64.exe && powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/build-windows-tray.ps1
scripts.build:agent:linux: npm run bundle:agent && node -e "require('fs').mkdirSync('dist/linux',{recursive:true})" && pkg build/local-agent.cjs --targets node20-linux-x64 --output dist/linux/slack-activity-agent-linux-x64
scripts.build:agent:mac: npm run bundle:agent && node -e "require('fs').mkdirSync('dist/macos',{recursive:true})" && pkg build/local-agent.cjs --targets node22-macos-x64 --no-signature --output dist/macos/slack-activity-agent-macos-x64 && pkg build/local-agent.cjs --targets node22-macos-arm64 --no-signature --no-bytecode --public --output dist/macos/slack-activity-agent-macos-arm64
